aas.name: Chaotic Stab
aas.description: This passive ability allows your backstab attacks to deal minimal backstab damage if you are not behind your target. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Escape
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 102 - Refresh Time: 0:05:00 - Ability Timer(s): 89. This ability, when activated, allows you to escape combat from NPCs that are 20 or fewer levels higher than you, causes you to be the last possible target of rampage attacks from any current attacker, and triggers Evader's Invisibility which grants permanent invisibility. This ability consumes 2% of your endurance to activate. Requirements: level 10.

aas.name: Innate Sneakiness
aas.description: Grants the Rogue the ability to move while using Hide, provided that the sneak ability is also active. This allows them to move around unseen by most creatures. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Purge Poison
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 107 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 12. This ability, when activated, cures you of 1200 poison counters. Requirements: level 15.

aas.name: Shroud of Stealth
aas.description: This passive ability provides you a previously unheard of level of stealth that increases the invisibility offered by your Hide skill to tier 2, shadowing you from creatures that normally see through standard invisibility. Requirements: level 35. }
